title: White Label Web Hosting Video
summaryWhat: A white-label web hosting video that introduces Hostopia hosting for service providers—positioning shared, WordPress, VPS, and dedicated options for SMB customers.
summaryWhy: Gives partners a ready-to-share explainer they can watch in multiple languages (via the embedded player) or download as an English MP4 for offline and campaign use.
summaryHow: Preview in Connects to watch with in-player language options, or add to My Resources to download the English MP4 after the short form. Use in sales calls, onboarding, and partner enablement.
